microsoft/WSL#4699.next_action_reason: Very high-upvote VHDX compaction feature; latest comment reports Optimize-VHD corruption risk after workaround.
microsoft/WSL#4699.suggested_reply: Thanks for keeping this thread current. We should treat this as a first-class storage-management feature rather than relying on manual cleanup. Next step: WSL maintainers should confirm whether automatic safe shrink/reclaim is on the roadmap or split out the remaining design constraints.

microsoft/WSL#4197.next_action_reason: Hundreds of reports still show /mnt filesystem perf far slower than WSL1, even with virtiofs enabled.

Next step: maintainers should identify the current expected baseline for /mnt performance and whether fresh traces from current WSL builds would help isolate the remaining bottleneck.

Next step: please share current WSL version, Windows build, networkingMode setting, and the exact LAN reachability scenario that still fails.

Next step: please identify current applications still blocked by this and whether they require byte-range locks, POSIX locks, or SQLite locking specifically so the team can scope expected support.
